stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
You plan a 5 hour flight on 12th March 2017 at 3000 feet altitude from Hahn (H) (50°N 007°E) to Brest (B) (49°N 004°W), taking off at 17:00 UTC. What hazards could be expected along the route?

options.a: Moderate turbulence throughout the route, with severe icing along the second half.
options.b: Moderate icing and turbulence throughout the route, with severe icing along the second half.
options.c: Moderate turbulence throughout the route, with no reportable icing forecast at the planned altitude.
options.d: Moderate turbulence throughout the route, with moderate icing along the second half.
